2604.01220.title: Universal YOCO for Efficient Depth Scaling
2604.01220.paper_summary: The rise of test-time scaling has remarkably boosted the reasoning and agentic proficiency of Large Language Models (LLMs). Yet, standard Transformers struggle to scale inference-time compute efficiently, as conventional looping strategies suffer from high computational overhead and a KV cache that inflates alongside model depth. We present Universal YOCO (YOCO-U), which combines the YOCO decoder-decoder architecture with recursive computation to achieve a synergistic effect greater than either alone. Built on the YOCO framework, YOCO-U implements a Universal Self-Decoder that performs multiple iterations via parameter sharing, while confining the iterative process to shallow, efficient-attention layers. This combination yields a favorable capability-efficiency tradeoff that neither YOCO nor recursion achieves independently. The YOCO architecture provides a constant global KV cache and linear pre-filling, while partial recursion enhances representational depth with limited overhead. Together, YOCO-U improves token utility and scaling behavior while maintaining efficient inference. Empirical results confirm that YOCO-U remains highly competitive in general and long-context benchmarks, demonstrating that the integration of efficient-attention architectures and recursive computation is a promising direction for scalable LLMs.
2604.01220.paper_summary_zh: 測試時間擴展的興起顯著提升了大型語言模型（LLMs）的推理和代理能力。<lb/>然而，標準的Transformer在推理時間計算上難以有效擴展，因為傳統的循環策略面臨著高計算開銷以及隨著模型深度增加而膨脹的KV緩存。<lb/>我們提出了通用YOCO（YOCO-U），它將YOCO解碼器-解碼器架構與遞歸計算相結合，以實現比單獨使用任何一者更大的協同效應。<lb/>基於YOCO框架，YOCO-U實現了一個通用自解碼器，通過參數共享進行多次迭代，同時將迭代過程限制在淺層、高效注意力層中。<lb/>這種結合產生了一個有利的能力-效率權衡，這是YOCO或遞歸單獨無法實現的。<lb/>YOCO架構提供了一個恆定的全局KV緩存和線性預填充，而部分遞歸則以有限的開銷增強了表徵深度。<lb/>綜合來看，YOCO-U改善了標記的效用和擴展行為，同時保持了高效的推理。<lb/>實證結果確認，YOCO-U在一般和長上下文基準中仍然具有高度競爭力，顯示出高效注意力架構和遞歸計算的整合是可擴展LLMs的一個有前景的方向。
2604.01220.author: Yutao Sun et.al.
2604.01220.authors: Yutao Sun, Li Dong, Tianzhu Ye, Shaohan Huang, Jianyong Wang, Furu Wei
